name: Urban Monsoon Flood in Korangi
description: Heavy monsoon rain causes severe urban flooding in Korangi Industrial Area and surrounding residential blocks. Nullahs overflow, vehicles stranded, industrial workers trapped.

initial_signals.content: Alert: Extreme monsoon rainfall detected — 72mm in last 3 hours. Flash flood warning issued for low-lying areas of Korangi and Landhi.
Korangi No. 4 mein pani bhar gaya hai. Gaadiyaan phaas gayi hain, ghar mein paani aa gaya hai!
URGENT: Korangi Industrial Area completely submerged. Workers stranded inside factories. Nullah has overflowed onto main road. #KarachiFloods #Help
Water level: 3.8m (Critical threshold: 2.5m). Overflow imminent. Nullah capacity exceeded by 52%.
Caller: 'Hamaare ghar mein 3 feet paani aa gaya hai, bachche chhatt par hain, please jaldi aao!' Address: House B-47, Korangi No. 4.
Confirmed: Korangi Industrial Road completely blocked. Water depth 4 feet at lowest point. Minimum 200 vehicles stranded. Rescue boats required urgently.
